name: Grilled Tarragon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons minced fresh tarragon, or 1/2 teaspoon dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread Dijon mustard on both sides of the chicken; sprinkle with black pepper.
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Combine melted butter, lemon juice, fresh minced tarragon (or dried tarragon), and garlic salt in a small bowl.
4. Grill the chicken over hot coals until juices run clear, basting frequently with the butter mixture during the last 3-5 minutes of cooking.
Yield: 4 servings
